info.title: DIU QuestionBank API
info.description:
Backend API for **DIU QuestionBank**, running on Cloudflare Workers.

## Authentication

Sign in with a verified `@diu.edu.bd` Google account. Obtain a Google ID token client-side
(Google Sign-In), then exchange it for a DIU QuestionBank JWT:

```http
POST /auth/google
Content-Type: application/json

{ "idToken": "<google-id-token>" }
```

The response includes a JWT — pass it on every authenticated request:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

If the verified DIU email already exists, the existing user is signed in (`200`). If not, a new
user is created with an opaque generated username (`201`). Its role is `"admin"` when the
email matches the configured `ADMIN_EMAIL`; otherwise it is `"user"`. Google accounts outside
the `diu.edu.bd` domain are rejected (`403`).

## Conventions

- All timestamps are **Unix epoch seconds** (UTC integers), not ISO 8601 strings.
- Errors return `{ "error": "<message>" }`. Validation failures additionally include an
  `issues` array with field-level details.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Sign in with Google and manage the currently signed-in user (profile, avatar).

tags.name: files
tags.description: Public file serving for uploaded objects (e.g. profile images).

tags.name: contributors
tags.description: Public read access to contributors (users who have submitted).

tags.name: questions
tags.description: Public read access to the question bank.

tags.name: filter-options
tags.description: Lookup entities (departments, courses, semesters, exam types) for the filter UI.

tags.name: manual-submissions
tags.description: Signed-in users: upload and manage PDFs submitted for review.

tags.name: admin-manual-submissions
tags.description: Admin: review and manage manual submissions.

googleClientId.description: Google OAuth client id, used to initialize Google Sign-In on the frontend.

image.description: Image file (PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP — max 5 MB).
Absolute URL to the profile image, or null if none is set.
Absolute URL to the profile image, or null if none is set.

fileSize.description: Size of the PDF in bytes.

get.description:
**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

Returns the public configuration a client needs to start the Google sign-in flow (currently the Google OAuth client id). No secrets are exposed.

post.description:
**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

Exchange a Google ID token for a DIU QuestionBank JWT. Only verified `@diu.edu.bd` emails are allowed. Existing email → `200`; new user created → `201`. The response shape is the same in both cases.

401.description: Invalid or expired Google ID token

403.description: Only @diu.edu.bd email addresses can sign in

get.description:
**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Returns the user record for the token on the request.

patch.description:
**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Updates editable fields on your own account (`name` and/or `username`). Only the fields you send are changed. Email is immutable (it comes from Google).

put.description:
**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Uploads a new profile image (or replaces the existing one), stored in R2. Accepts PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP, max 5 MB. The previous image, if any, is deleted after the swap. The returned `user.image` is an absolute URL.

413.description: Image exceeds the 5 MB size limit

get.description:
**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

Streams a stored file (e.g. a profile image) from object storage. Keys come from the `image` field on user objects. Responses are immutable and cacheable.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

Users who have at least one submission, most prolific first. Paginated.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

A single contributor's public profile and total submission count.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

A contributor's own submissions, newest first. Paginated. Each row carries its parent question (`id` + `title`) instead of the contributor, and links to its PDF via `pdfUrl` (served by `GET /files/:key`).

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

All departments, courses, semesters, and exam types — the lookup entities a client needs to build the questions filter UI.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

Questions with their lookup entities and submission count, newest first. Paginated and filterable by `departmentId`, `courseId`, `semesterId`, and `examTypeId`.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

A single question with its lookup entities and submission count. The submissions themselves are served by `GET /questions/{id}/submissions`.

**Access:** `Public` — No authentication required.

**All** submissions for a question (no pagination — a single question has few). Each submission links to its PDF via `pdfUrl` (served by `GET /files/:key`) and includes the contributor, if any.

**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Returns only manual submissions owned by the authenticated user, newest first.

post.description:
**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Uploads a PDF for review. Ownership comes from the bearer token and status starts as `pending_review`.

413.description: PDF exceeds the 20 MB size limit

delete.description:
**Access:** `User` — Requires a bearer token. Open to any signed-in user (admins included).

Deletes a manual submission only when it belongs to the authenticated user, then removes its PDF from storage.

409.description: Approved manual submissions cannot be deleted by users

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated list of departments.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on name or short name.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Creates a new department.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single department.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates a department. Only the fields you send are changed.

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a department. Blocked with 409 if other records reference it.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated list of courses.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Creates a new course.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single course.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates a course. Only the fields you send are changed.

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a course. Blocked with 409 if other records reference it.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated list of semesters.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Creates a new semester.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single semester.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates a semester. Only the fields you send are changed.

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a semester. Blocked with 409 if other records reference it.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated list of exam types.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Creates a new exam type.

get.summary: Get a exam type by id
get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single exam type.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates a exam type. Only the fields you send are changed.

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a exam type. Blocked with 409 if other records reference it.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated, filterable by `departmentId`/`courseId`/`semesterId`/`examTypeId`. Each item includes the nested lookup entities and a dynamic submission count.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Creates a question from the four lookup ids. The combination must be unique.

400.description: Validation failed, or a referenced entity does not exist

409.description: A question with this combination already exists

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single question with its entities and submission count.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates the lookup ids of a question. Only the fields you send are changed.

400.description: Validation failed, or a referenced entity does not exist

409.description: A question with this combination already exists

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a question. Blocked with 409 if it has submissions.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated, filterable by `questionId`, `userId`, and `watermarkStatus`. Newest first.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Uploads a PDF (multipart field `pdf`, max 20 MB) and creates a submission for the given `questionId`, attributed to a `userId` (contributor, required).

413.description: PDF exceeds the 20 MB size limit

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single submission with its question, contributor, and file URLs.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates submission metadata (`questionId`, `userId`, `section`, `batch`, `watermarkStatus`). `section`/`batch` accept `null` to clear them. Use `PUT /admin/submissions/{id}/pdf` to replace the file.

400.description: Validation failed, or a referenced entity does not exist

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a submission and removes its PDF (and watermarked PDF) from storage.

409.description: An approved manual submission references this submission

put.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Replaces the PDF (multipart field `pdf`, max 20 MB). Resets watermarking to `awaiting` and clears any existing watermarked file.

413.description: PDF exceeds the 20 MB size limit

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated review queue. Filter by status, user, department, course, semester, or exam type.

**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Returns the review request, submitter, reviewer, lookup entities, PDF URL, and approval links.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Edits the department, course, semester, and/or exam type before approval. Approved requests are immutable.

409.description: Approved manual submissions cannot be edited

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes the review record. Pending/rejected PDFs are removed; an approved submission and its PDF are preserved.

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Moves the PDF into the normal `submissions/` storage path, atomically creates or reuses the matching question, creates the real submission, and records the reviewing admin.

409.description: Already approved, or the PDF is missing from storage

post.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Rejects an unapproved request with a required reason and records the reviewing admin.

409.description: Approved manual submissions cannot be rejected

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Paginated, searchable by name/email/username and filterable by `role`. Each item includes `email`, `role`, and a dynamic submission count.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on name, email, or username.

get.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

A single user, including email, role, and submission count.

patch.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Updates a user's `name`, `username`, and/or `role`. You cannot remove your own admin role.

409.description: Username already taken, or you tried to demote yourself

delete.description:
**Access:** `Admin` — Requires a bearer token from an account with `role: "admin"`.

Deletes a user only when no question-bank or manual submissions reference them. You cannot delete your own account.

409.description: Self-delete is forbidden, or submissions reference this user
